The '''''Onyx Star''''' was the codename for the prototype of the [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] developed at the [[Bahalian Shipyards]] in the [[Bajic sector/Legends|Bajic sector]]. The ''Onyx Star'' was stolen by [[Icaris Tool and Drive]] but later returned to [[Sublight Products Corporation]] for refinement and mass production.<ref name="The Crystal" />
